languages.text: {n}Прочная, хорошо выделанная кожа с дорогим тиснением практически не потускнела под действием времени. Герб фон Валанциус, выдавленный в ней, украшен крупными самоцветами. Фолиант покрыт множеством царапин и потертостей, словно журналу на своем веку пришлось пережить не одно приключение. В нижней части обложки витиевато написано имя — "Себериан фон Валанциус". Похоже, это личный дневник.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Прочная, хорошо выделанная кожа с дорогим тиснением практически не потускнела под действием времени. Герб фон Валанциус, выдавленный в ней, украшен крупными самоцветами. Фолиант покрыт множеством царапин и потертостей, словно журналу на своем веку пришлось пережить не одно приключение. В нижней части обложки витиевато написано имя — "Себериан фон Валанциус". Похоже, это личный дневник.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The sturdy, well-crafted leather with expensive embossing has hardly faded with the effects of time. The von Valancius coat of arms stamped on it is embellished with large gems. The book is covered in many scratches and scuffs, as if the book has survived more than a few adventures. At the bottom of the cover, the name "Seberian von Valancius" is written in florid script. It appears to be a personal diary.{/n}

languages.text: {n}书本由坚固精良的皮革装订而成，上面的昂贵压花几乎未被岁月侵蚀。封面上的冯·瓦兰修斯家徽还点缀着硕大的宝石。书本上满是擦痕和磨损，像是经历过不少冒险。封面底部用花体写着“塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯”。看来，这是一本私人日记。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The sturdy, well-crafted leather with expensive embossing has hardly faded with the effects of time. The von Valancius coat of arms stamped on it is embellished with large gems. The book is covered in many scratches and scuffs, as if the book has survived more than a few adventures. At the bottom of the cover, the name "Seberian von Valancius" is written in florid script. It appears to be a personal diary.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}书本由坚固精良的皮革装订而成，上面的昂贵压花几乎未被岁月侵蚀。封面上的冯·瓦兰修斯家徽还点缀着硕大的宝石。书本上满是擦痕和磨损，像是经历过不少冒险。封面底部用花体写着“塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯”。看来，这是一本私人日记。{/n}

languages.text: {n}El cuero es recio y está bien producido, con un costoso estampado que apenas muestra el paso del tiempo. El escudo de armas de los von Valancius que tiene grabado está decorado con gemas. El libro está cubierto de arañazos y magulladuras, reflejando que también ha vivido numerosas aventuras. En la parte inferior de la tapa figura el nombre de «Seberian von Valancius» en ostentosa caligrafía. Parece tratarse de un diario personal.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The sturdy, well-crafted leather with expensive embossing has hardly faded with the effects of time. The von Valancius coat of arms stamped on it is embellished with large gems. The book is covered in many scratches and scuffs, as if the book has survived more than a few adventures. At the bottom of the cover, the name "Seberian von Valancius" is written in florid script. It appears to be a personal diary.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El cuero es recio y está bien producido, con un costoso estampado que apenas muestra el paso del tiempo. El escudo de armas de los von Valancius que tiene grabado está decorado con gemas. El libro está cubierto de arañazos y magulladuras, reflejando que también ha vivido numerosas aventuras. En la parte inferior de la tapa figura el nombre de «Seberian von Valancius» en ostentosa caligrafía. Parece tratarse de un diario personal.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le cuir robuste, de bonne qualité, orné de coûteuses impressions en relief, s'est à peine terni avec le temps. Les armoiries des von Valancius qui le décorent sont embellies par des gemmes volumineuses. Le livre est couvert d'éraflures, comme s'il avait survécu à de nombreuses aventures. En bas de la couverture, le nom de Seberian von Valancius est inscrit en lettres ornées. Il semble s'agir d'un journal personnel.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The sturdy, well-crafted leather with expensive embossing has hardly faded with the effects of time. The von Valancius coat of arms stamped on it is embellished with large gems. The book is covered in many scratches and scuffs, as if the book has survived more than a few adventures. At the bottom of the cover, the name "Seberian von Valancius" is written in florid script. It appears to be a personal diary.{/n}

Les armoiries des von Valancius qui le décorent sont embellies par des gemmes volumineuses. Le livre est couvert d'éraflures, comme s'il avait survécu à de nombreuses aventures. En bas de la couverture, le nom de Seberian von Valancius est inscrit en lettres ornées. Il semble s'agir d'un journal personnel.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Pahalı kabartmaları olan sağlam, iyi işlenmiş deri; zamanın etkileriyle zar zor solmuş. Üzerine basılan von Valancius arması, büyük mücevherlerle süslenmiş. Kitap, sanki birkaç maceradan fazlasını atlatmış gibi birçok çizik ve aşınmayla kaplı. Kapağın alt kısmında "Seberian von Valancius" adı, süslü bir yazıyla yazılmış. Kişisel bir günlüğe benziyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The sturdy, well-crafted leather with expensive embossing has hardly faded with the effects of time. The von Valancius coat of arms stamped on it is embellished with large gems. The book is covered in many scratches and scuffs, as if the book has survived more than a few adventures. At the bottom of the cover, the name "Seberian von Valancius" is written in florid script. It appears to be a personal diary.{/n}

Kitap, sanki birkaç maceradan fazlasını atlatmış gibi birçok çizik ve aşınmayla kaplı. Kapağın alt kısmında "Seberian von Valancius" adı, süslü bir yazıyla yazılmış. Kişisel bir günlüğe benziyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Dem robusten, hochwertigen Leder mit seinen teuren Beschlägen konnte die Zeit kaum etwas anhaben. Das Wappen derer von Valancius auf dem Buchdeckel ist mit großen Edelsteinen verziert. Das Buch hat zahllose Kratzer und Schrammen, als hätte es schon so manches Abenteuer erlebt. Am unteren Rand des Umschlags steht mit blumiger Schrift 'Seberian von Valancius'. Das Buch scheint ein persönliches Tagebuch zu sein.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The sturdy, well-crafted leather with expensive embossing has hardly faded with the effects of time. The von Valancius coat of arms stamped on it is embellished with large gems. The book is covered in many scratches and scuffs, as if the book has survived more than a few adventures. At the bottom of the cover, the name "Seberian von Valancius" is written in florid script. It appears to be a personal diary.{/n}

Am unteren Rand des Umschlags steht mit blumiger Schrift 'Seberian von Valancius'. Das Buch scheint ein persönliches Tagebuch zu sein.{/n}

languages.text: {n}高価なエンボス加工が施された丈夫でしっかりとした革は、時間の経過による影響でほとんど色褪せていません。その上に刻まれたフォン・ヴァランキウス家の紋章は、大きな宝石で飾られています。この本は、数々の冒険を生き延びたかのように、多くの傷や擦れ傷で覆われています。表紙の下部に「セベリアン・フォン・ヴァランキウス」という名前が華麗な文字で書かれています。これは、個人的な日記のようです。{/n}
